male_student_height.description: Heights (in inches) of the SRS of 18 male university students, represented by sample size and sample mean, used to compute the z test statistic.

population_mean_height.description: Known average height (in inches) of men in the general population, used as the null hypothesis value μ₀ = 69.

population_sd.description: Known population standard deviation (in inches) of male height, used in the denominator of the z test statistic.
